title: Vicloon Microfiber Cleaning Cloths, 6Pcs Super Absorbent Microfibre Cleaning Cloth，Reusable Microfiber Dish Cloths，Multipurpose Cleaning Towels for House,Kitchen, Size 25 x 25 cm
features: 🧽【Package Contents】6 pieces of microfiber cleaning cloths, 3 colors: blue, pink and green, enough for your daily needs and replacement. The size is 25*25cm, and the seamed version absorbs more water than ordinary cleaning cloths. The rag is not easy to fade and has no water marks. But avoid ironing or bleaching.

🧽【Premium Cleaning Cloth】The microfiber cloth is made of polyester material, the microfiber cleaning cloth can easily capture dust, dirt and debris, absorb liquid and moisture, and effectively wipe away oil and stains. Reusable and machine washable, keep it clean and tidy.

🧽【Super Absorbent Performance】The microfiber cleaning cloth has strong water absorption and water retention capacity, super soft super absorbent microfiber cleaning cloth, strong water absorption, water storage, quick drying, soft and does not damage items, high cleanliness.

🧽【Reusable and Durable】These microfiber towels feature high-quality stitching and reinforced edges that are durable enough to withstand hundreds of washes. They are lightweight, absorbent and fast drying, use them every day to enjoy your cleaning.

🧽【Multipurpose Cleaning Cloths】These cleaning rags can be used in home, kitchen, bathroom, office, garage, car, etc. Great for cleaning screens, glass, windows, granite, ceramic, metal and other surfaces. It is the best helper for household cleaning work.
description: Product Description Effective stain removal Our microfiber cleaning cloths often have excellent stain removal properties as they attract dirt, grease and tiny particles, effectively removing stubborn stains and grime. Leaves surfaces looking like new. Soft and lint-free It is made of polyester material with a soft, lint-free texture that maintains the efficient performance of the cleaning cloth. It contains no harmful substances to protect the health and safety of you and your family. Highly absorbent It absorbs water quickly, dries quickly and can be reused hundreds of times. Please note that after use and cleaning, rags are dried flat or hung to prevent mold growth. Widespread The cleaning cloth is suitable for a variety of cleaning scenarios, such as: Such as cleaning dishes, cleaning table tops, glass surfaces and mirrors, and cleaning cars without leaving scratches, it is a multi-purpose tool for house cleaning activities.
